essence: Develops and coordinates plans to prepare for, respond to, and recover from emergencies and major incidents.

identity.title: Emergency Planning Coordinator
identity.summary: Creates contingency plans, runs exercises, and coordinates multi‑agency responses to ensure community resilience.

salary.notes: Senior roles in large local authorities or national agencies attract higher pay.

qualifications: Experience in emergency planning, civil contingencies, or resilience roles
Knowledge of multi‑agency coordination and incident management
Strong project management and communication skills
Ability to run exercises and produce clear plans

lifestyle.description: Office and stakeholder engagement role with responsibility for preparedness, exercises, and incident coordination when required.

habits: Develops and updates emergency plans and procedures
Coordinates resources and communications during incidents
Engages with communities and partner organisations
